label: Full Audit + Mass Implementation
topWin: All 15 audit-tier items (Highest Leverage + Highest Ceiling) shipped in a single session with full HTML/CSS/JS wiring and API routes.
topGap: Engine hooks (beatReporter, rivalryDNA, injurySystem, gmLegacy) are implemented but not yet wired into GameSession.js — they won't fire automatically until next session.
ignisNote: Largest single session to date — 15 features across both audit tiers with clean engine/UI separation; the pattern of audit→brainstorm→mass-implement is working well but engine hook wiring into GameSession remains a recurring deferred item that needs to become a first-class session task.
